name: Schylling NeeDoh Nice Cube - Sensory Squeeze Toy with Super Solid Squish - 2.25" Cube - Color May Vary (Pack of 1)
bullets: Bring chill vibes with you everywhere with a squeeze of the Nice Cube!
This squish sensation feels soft when slow squished and firm when fast squished
Squeeze, stretch, squish, and watch it return to its original shape!
Color may vary (blue, pink, purple); 1 Nice Cube per order

reviews.name: Jules
reviews.title: Fun fidget
reviews.body: It's a nice squish. It did pop on the bottom after many days of hard play from many kids. When we first opened it, it was very heavy on fumes, but they dissipated shortly after. The kids think they're fun and awesome.

reviews.name: Iviany Guerra Trujillo
reviews.title: Super Fun and Satisfying Stress Cube!
reviews.body: The NeeDoh Nice Cube is incredibly fun to squeeze and perfect for relieving stress. It has a unique, firm texture that feels satisfying in your hand and always returns to its original shape. The compact size makes it easy to carry in a pocket or bag, so it’s great for home, work, or school. Both kids and adults can enjoy it, and the quality is excellent. It’s a simple but very enjoyable sensory…

reviews.name: Blue Cat
reviews.title: Authentic Schylling Needoh- Very nice!
reviews.body: This is an authentic Schylling Needoh Gumdrop. Very nice and very squishable without getting holes in it. I would recommend this item. My daughter loves it and it will last. We purchased several Squishies from another site, that were labeled as Needohs, but when we got them they were fake and most of them got holes in them within a short time. This one is the real deal so it is much more durable.

reviews.name: MrsCatt
reviews.title: Best nee doh
reviews.body: If you are looking to buy a good feeling, high quality nee doh, I recommend you buy the nee doh gum drop. It feels soft if you squish it lightly, and hard if you squish it fast. It has an amazing texture that makes you want to squish it a ton. The size is about the palm of my hand, and the size feels good. The gumdrop does smell a little rubbery on the first few days, but it doesn’t affect the…
